description: Generate structured Markdown context from project files for AI assistant interactions
command.generateWorkspace.title: Generate AI Context for Workspace
command.generateFolder.title: Generate AI Context for Current Folder
command.generateSelected.title: Generate AI Context for Selected Files
command.configure.title: Configure AI Context Generator
command.openSidebar.title: Open AI Context Sidebar
command.openLogs.title: Open AI Context Generator Logs
viewsContainers.title: AI Context
view.name: Context Generator
configuration.title: AI Context Generator
configuration.maxFileSize.description: Maximum file size in bytes before showing outline/summary (default: 50KB)
configuration.maxTokens.description: Token limit warning threshold (does not truncate)
configuration.textPreviewLength.descript: Number of characters for text file preview
configuration.logSampleLines.description: Number of lines to sample from log files per level
configuration.csvSampleRows.description: Number of rows to sample from CSV files
configuration.sensitiveKeyPatterns.descr: Patterns for detecting sensitive keys in config files
configuration.autoDetectLanguage.descrip: Automatically detect programming language for syntax highlighting
configuration.ignorePatterns.description: Additional glob patterns to ignore (combined with .aicontextignore)
configuration.binaryFilePatterns.descrip: Glob patterns for files to treat as binary
configuration.outputFileName.description: Default output filename when using file output
configuration.showTreeEmoji.description: Show emoji markers on selected files in directory tree
configuration.tokenEstimation.descriptio: Token counting method: tiktoken (accurate) or simple (lightweight)
configuration.parallelFileReads.descript: Maximum number of parallel file read operations
configuration.logLevel.description: Log level for output channel (debug, info, warn, error)
